1d. Protected routes redirect to login without auth
2d. CRM alerts widget shows on dashboard (21 alerts, 17 urgent)
3a. Click lead card opens detail modal

4b. Client name and project status displayed
4d. Shared files section with download button visible
5a. Lead files API returns files with sharedWithClient status
6d. Public portfolio /portfolio/3aa2d156-... loads with 'Kolor Studio' header

8a. Settings modal opens with 3 tabs: Currency, Brand, Reviews
8b. Brand tab shows color pickers (primary/accent), font options
9b. /terms loads Terms of Service with content
9c. /signup shows legal agreement with Terms and Privacy links (data-testid='signup-legal-agreement')
10c. Quick-start guides present in help panel
11b. Revenue Dashboard widget visible (data-tour='revenue-dashboard') - Shows $1.8k this month, +100%
13a. Dashboard at 375px - no horizontal overflow, hamburger menu visible
13b. Client portal at 375px - content readable, no overflow
